name: MINKABU THE INFONOID, Inc.
summary: MINKABU THE INFONOID, Inc. provides financial information services in Japan and internationally. It offers stock information distribution services; and commodity futures information services. The company also provides services, including system development services, such as planning, design, development, operation support, etc., as well as development of financial information media. MINKABU THE INFONOID, Inc. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
